institution.name: New Mexico Institute of Mining and Technology

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at New Mexico Institute of Mining and Technology fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 995).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at New Mexico Institute of Mining and Technology rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.4k → $9.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at New Mexico Institute of Mining and Technology rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.3k → $27.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at New Mexico Institute of Mining and Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
